name: MYUGAN SUTANSU: CHAKRA HEN 'I (MYUGAN STANCE: CHAKRA DISPLACEMENT)

description.value:
The user must have the Shitatchi bloodline ability activated in order to perform this technique.

The user must make both a Concentration and Chakra Control check (DC 25) to gather a large amount of chakra in his hands. They will take the shape of tiny, sharp points on the fingertips. Next the user makes a touch attack against a single creature. If the user succeeds his touch attack, he will hit the target in a selected area. Instead of dealing damage, the user makes contact and performs a second Chakra Control check (DC 20 + the target's CR) to extract the target's chakra. The user drains 10d4 points of chakra from the target. Finally, the user can do one of the following:

Chakra Explosion: The user can harness and force the absorbed chakra back out in the form of force damage. The user may target the same creature he drained chakra from, or a different creature in an adjacent square to the user. The target will suffer damage equal to 1 per chakra point drained.

Chakra Transfer: If the user is within five feet of another enemy or an allied ninja, he can transfer the chakra to that person. The user makes a ranged touch attack to isolate the new target's chakra points and force chakra into their body. If the target is an enemy, the user can pump all of the chakra into a small region of points to deal damage equal to the amount of chakra originally drained. If the target is an ally, the user can make a Concentration check (DC 30) to focus on the amount he is expending so that he can restore the ally's chakra pool without overloading them. Any leftover points of chakra are converted to damage to the user.

Passive Disperse: The user can make a chakra control check (DC 20) to release the chakra out of his arm in a ray away from the user. If a creature happens to be in the way of the blast, it can make a Reflex save to avoid the blast or else suffer 2d8 force damage.

Requires: Shitatchi (a)
